event: Monks Tasting Wine in a Cellar
description: A painting set in a dim wine cellar with stone walls and large wooden wine barrels stacked against the walls. At center, a rotund man in an apron holds a glass of wine aloft, examining its color against the light from a doorway at the upper left. He has a broad, jovial smile. Beside him, a monk in a brown Franciscan or Capuchin habit holds his own glass and leans in companionably. Two other monks in brown habits are also present — one seated at right, another in the shadows at left. A small barrel serves as a table between them.
